reviews.review_msg: Great class.  Hard tests, but marked fairly.  The assignments were helpful.  Lots of math which can turn off some ecologists, but I feel it's very important.
The exams are really hard, and in order to get all of the notes, you need to go to class (powerpoint slides alone won't help you).  This guy can actually make math interesting.

The time I am taking the course was also Paul's first ever semester teaching BISC407. I love his lectures slides they are very concise and to the point. 75% of the material on his practice midterm shows up on the actual exams. There are weekly assignments that you have to do, and a group project, but they are free marks if you do homework and read.
